title: Realistic Adventures
description: Realistic Adventures with seasons, new tools, biomes, and everything with the least possible performance impact - All in this modpack!
body:
This modpack is full of Adventure! It adds new biomes, new tools. Rarely seen structures but much rarer loots. Bigger biomes, and Seasons for planting, and much more!
Netherite armor "levels" and custom "abilities" from what material do you upgrade it with.
It upgrades villages to be bigger, and to contain more loot. It adds new nether and end biomes! And more thing you can explore!

All of this with minimal performance impact.

You should download this pack if you want new, more fun, more extended version of minecraft.

If you download, you must know, that on lower hardwares it cloud be laggy, so set render, shadow distances to approx. 10-5 chunks.

If you generate a world, but you don't want the pack's worldgen, you can select normal one, so biomes will be as normal as in game. But structures, loots can be the same as in the custom worldgen.



Version tagging:
- Singleplayer is Release
- Multiplay(er) is Beta




**_THANK YOU FOR 5000 DOWNLOADS!_**

This motivates me to continue this project and to support it! I hope you enjoy it!

Next achievement: 10000 DOWNLOADS

Contact me at Discord: zyvrec.
